summary: Completed frontend testing of Scholarship Applications detail view field mappings. All tests PASSED. The frontend correctly handles both MySQL field names (mobile, qualification, percentage, board_university, entrance_exam) and MongoDB field names (phone, current_education, tenth_percentage) to ensure compatibility with both data sources.
passed_tests: Scholarship Applications list page loads correctly with application data
Table displays phone/mobile number correctly in Student column (using app.mobile || app.phone)
View button opens detail modal successfully
Personal Information section shows Phone/Mobile correctly (using selectedApp.mobile || selectedApp.phone)
Personal Information section shows Full Name, Email, Gender, Father's Name, Mother's Name
Academic Information section shows Percentage/CGPA (using percentage || tenth_percentage || twelfth_percentage)
Academic Information section shows Highest Qualification (using qualification || current_education)
Academic Information section shows Board/University (board_university)
Academic Information section shows Entrance Exams (entrance_exam)
Preferences section shows Preferred Stream (preferred_stream)
Preferences section shows Preferred Course (preferred_course)
Preferences section shows Preferred Location (preferred_location, preferred_state)
Preferences section shows Preferred College (preferred_college)
Documents section shows download links for marks_card_url and entrance_scorecard_url when available
UTM Tracking section shows Source, Medium, Campaign
Admin can update status via dropdown (7 status options: Pending, Under Review, Contacted, Eligible, Not Eligible, Converted, Rejected)
Admin can assign counselor via dropdown
Admin can add notes via textarea
Counselor Scholarships page loads correctly
Counselor can view application details with correct field mappings
Get Referral Link button opens UTM link dialog with copy functionality
critical_code_review_comments: Field mappings correctly handle both MySQL and MongoDB field names using OR operators (||)
Detail modal shows: selectedApp.mobile || selectedApp.phone || 'Not provided'
All conditional rendering uses proper null checks with && operator
seed_data_creation: Using existing test data from iteration 16
